title: SQL Views & Complex Queries
description: Oracle SQL work on a ride-sharing schema (Trips, Customers, Drivers, Vehicles). Creates a `frequent_riders` view aggregating riders with three or more trips, then writes multi-table JOIN queries using date filtering, CASE expressions, and aggregate functions with TRIM, TO_CHAR, and NVL for data formatting and null handling.
shortDescription: Oracle SQL: frequent-rider view and multi-table JOINs with aggregates on a ride-sharing schema.
